positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical deep-sea forest scene. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, featuring oversized bioluminescent flora (like glowing coral and luminous kelp) framing a majestic, simplified silhouette of a friendly, stylized manatee swimming through the center. The color palette is dominated by electric blues, neon greens, and pops of warm coral pink. Use strong, clean line art combined with flat, saturated areas of color, reminiscent of modern mid-century animation or stylized tattoo flash. The lighting should appear internal (bioluminescent glow) creating dramatic rim lighting on the manatee's edges. Focus on clear, bold shapes and high contrast for optimal print readability. Minimal background clutter, maximum graphic impact.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, low detail, worst quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, noise, fuzzy
